name: GolfRx
about: GolfRx is a premier indoor golf facility located in Mt. Juliet, Tennessee, serving the Nashville area. It offers a comprehensive range of services including golf lessons, custom club fitting, putter fitting, club repairs, and equipment sales. The facility is equipped with advanced technology such as a Full Swing Golf Simulator, ION3 tracking camera, and a V1 Digital Video Coaching System, providing an immersive learning environment for players of all skill levels. GolfRx is recognized for its professional staff, including PGA-certified instructors, and its commitment to improving the golf game through personalized coaching and expertly fitted equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including Full Swing Simulator and ION3 camera for real-time analysis
Custom club and putter fitting services tailored to individual player needs
PGA-certified instructors offering personalized golf lessons and video coaching
Convenient indoor facility accessible in all weather conditions
Comprehensive services from lessons to equipment and repairs in one location

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor golf simulator with advanced tracking technology
Camera system for real-time ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GolfRx offers club rentals, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs for lessons or simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour for one person to play 18 holes in the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GolfRx does not specifically advertise kid-friendly amenities or services, focusing more on adult golfers and serious practice.
